summary: Phase 5 KPI System & UX Standardization testing complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All KPI Dashboard tabs and searchable components working correctly.

KPI_DASHBOARD_ENDPOINT.test_kpi_dashboard_returns_8_cards: PASS - Returns 8 KPI cards (Total Sales, Target Achievement, Active Branches, Active Salesmen, Low Stock Items, Total AR, Total AP, Net Position)
KPI_DASHBOARD_ENDPOINT.test_kpi_dashboard_periods: PASS - All 5 periods work (today, week, month, quarter, year)

KPI_BRANCH_ENDPOINT.test_branch_overview_returns_summary: PASS - Returns summary with total_branches, total_sales, total_target, overall_achievement, achieved_count, on_track_count, behind_count
KPI_BRANCH_ENDPOINT.test_branch_overview_returns_branch_kpis: PASS - Each branch has sales, target, cash_control, status fields

KPI_SALES_ENDPOINT.test_sales_overview_returns_ranking: PASS - Returns summary with total_salesmen, total_sales, total_target, total_commission, achieved_count, behind_count
KPI_SALES_ENDPOINT.test_sales_ranking_has_correct_fields: PASS - Each salesman has salesman_id, salesman_name, actual_sales, target_value, achievement_percent, commission_generated, rank, status

KPI_INVENTORY_ENDPOINT.test_inventory_overview_returns_summary: PASS - Returns summary with total_products, total_stock_value, low_stock_count, dead_stock_count, slow_moving_count, pending_reorder_count
KPI_INVENTORY_ENDPOINT.test_inventory_overview_returns_alerts: PASS - Returns low_stock, dead_stock, slow_moving arrays
KPI_INVENTORY_ENDPOINT.test_inventory_overview_returns_warehous: PASS - Returns warehouse_stock with warehouse_id, warehouse_name, total_items, total_value

KPI_FINANCE_ENDPOINT.test_finance_overview_returns_ar_aging: PASS - Returns ar_summary with total, aging buckets (current, 1_30, 31_60, 61_90, over_90), overdue_percent
KPI_FINANCE_ENDPOINT.test_finance_overview_returns_ap_aging: PASS - Returns ap_summary with total, aging buckets, overdue_percent
KPI_FINANCE_ENDPOINT.test_finance_overview_returns_profit_sum: PASS - Returns profit_summary with revenue, cogs, gross_profit, gross_margin_percent

FRONTEND_KPI_DASHBOARD.page_load: PASS - KPI Dashboard page loads at /kpi-dashboard
FRONTEND_KPI_DASHBOARD.overview_tab: PASS - Shows 8 KPI cards with data, Top Branches and Top Salesmen sections
FRONTEND_KPI_DASHBOARD.branch_tab: PASS - Shows 56 branches with achievement status badges and KPI cards
FRONTEND_KPI_DASHBOARD.sales_tab: PASS - Shows 7 salesmen with ranking (1-7) and commission data
FRONTEND_KPI_DASHBOARD.inventory_tab: PASS - Shows 48 products, Low Stock/Slow Moving/Dead Stock alerts, warehouse breakdown
FRONTEND_KPI_DASHBOARD.finance_tab: PASS - Shows AR Aging (5 buckets), AP Aging (5 buckets), Branch Profitability

FRONTEND_REPORT_CENTER.page_load: PASS - Report Center page loads at /report-center
FRONTEND_REPORT_CENTER.data_testid_date-range-filter: FOUND - Date picker with default today working
FRONTEND_REPORT_CENTER.period_dropdown: PASS - Opens with options: Hari Ini, Minggu Ini, Bulan Ini, Kuartal Ini, Tahun Ini, Custom Range

FRONTEND_PURCHASE_PLANNING.page_load: PASS - Purchase Planning page loads at /purchase-planning
FRONTEND_PURCHASE_PLANNING.status_dropdown: PASS - Opens with options: Semua Status, Draft, Reviewed, Approved, PO Created, Cancelled

kpi_dashboard.overview_tab: 8 KPI cards with icons and color coding, Top Branches and Top Salesmen quick stats
kpi_dashboard.branch_tab: Branch ranking with achievement percentage, sales/target/transactions/discrepancy breakdown
kpi_dashboard.sales_tab: Sales ranking with positions 1-7, commission generated, achievement status
kpi_dashboard.inventory_tab: Low stock/slow moving/dead stock alerts with days count, warehouse stock breakdown
kpi_dashboard.finance_tab: AR/AP aging with 5 buckets, profit summary, branch profitability

ux_standardization.searchable_select: Type-to-filter dropdown component working in Report Center and Purchase Planning
ux_standardization.date_picker_default: Date picker component with today as default value working
ux_standardization.searchable_enum_select: Status and urgency filters with colored option badges working

critical_code_review_comments: All KPI endpoints properly calculate and aggregate data from multiple collections (sales_invoices, pos_transactions, branches, sales_persons, products, stock, etc.)
AR/AP aging calculation correctly groups by age buckets (current, 1-30, 31-60, 61-90, over 90 days)
Dead stock detection uses 90-day threshold, slow moving uses 30-day threshold - both working correctly
Branch achievement status correctly categorized as achieved (>=100%), on_track (>=80%), behind (<80%)
Searchable components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Date picker defaults to today correctly in Report Center

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified and functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 KPI System fully implemented and tested. KPI Dashboard at /kpi-dashboard has 5 tabs (Overview, Branch, Sales, Inventory, Finance) with period filter support (today, week, month, quarter, year). All searchable components (SearchableSelect, SearchableEnumSelect, DatePickerWithDefault) are reusable and working in Report Center and Purchase Planning. API endpoints return comprehensive KPI data with proper structure. No issues found.
